name: Bow of Songs
description: This +2 composite longbow resonates with bardic magic. When a bard fires it while maintaining a bardic performance, each arrow deals +1d4 sonic damage and the bardic performance DC increases by 2 until the start of the bard's next turn.

name: Oathbow
description: This +2 longbow can be used to swear a death oath against one designated enemy. Against that enemy: +5 attack, +2d6 damage, ignore cover and concealment. Against all other targets: -1 attack/damage. The oath ends when the target dies or after 1 week.

name: Composite Longbow of the Eagle
description: This +2 seeking composite longbow (+2 Str bonus) grants the wielder darkvision 60 ft. and a +5 competence bonus on Spot checks. The seeking ability negates miss chances from concealment (but not total concealment).

name: Crossbow of Speed
description: This +2 speed heavy crossbow allows an extra attack per round at the wielder's full attack bonus, in addition to the normal full-attack routine. It reloads as a free action.

name: Crossbow of Accuracy
description: This +3 distance heavy crossbow doubles the range increment of the weapon and treats the first range increment as point-blank range for the purposes of the Point-Blank Shot feat.

name: Returning Dagger of Defending
description: This +2 returning defending dagger automatically flies back to the thrower's hand after being thrown. Its defending property allows up to +2 of its enhancement bonus to be transferred to the wielder's AC as a free action.

name: Javelin of Lightning
description: When thrown as a ranged attack, this single-use javelin transforms into a bolt of lightning in flight. It deals 1d6 piercing damage plus 5d6 electricity to the target (DC 14 Reflex for half electricity). On a miss, the bolt still fires but deals only electricity damage. Single use.
